description: Track folder for the sk-git skill — Git development orchestration across workspace isolation, commit hygiene, and work completion. Hosts the live packets 000-007 (continuous-integration workflow, research and requirements, skill-scoped worktree naming, review remediation and alignment, feature catalog and manual playbook, README enrichment and hyphen naming, git review remediation, GitKraken MCP integration) plus an archive of superseded packets under z_archive (GitHub MCP integration, superset worktrees, sk-git README, commit standards and retroactive rewrite, reorg hardening, worktree convention and advisor routing).
